scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: every documented UpPromote API v2 endpoint (per the real OpenAPI reference published at aff-api.uppromote.com/docs/v2, distinct from the fictional api.uppromote.com/api/affiliates shape the legacy connector was originally built against and which the affiliates stream still targets verbatim for parity) is now covered by a stream or write action, except webhook-subscription-list (no distinct read value beyond what create/update/delete already confirm) and the endpoints listed below as excluded.

excluded.reason: legacy's fictional write-shaped affiliates endpoint has no real-API counterpart at this path; the real create-affiliate mutation is covered by create_affiliate at the real /api/v2/affiliates path instead
single-program detail; identical record shape to the programs list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
program-scoped excluded-products/collections sub-object read; a configuration detail of one program, not an independently syncable object list

the real v2 affiliate-list endpoint returns the same affiliate record type the legacy-shaped affiliates stream already covers (under legacy's own path/envelope, preserved for accepted-input parity); adding a second, differently-shaped affiliate list stream here would duplicate that record type

single-affiliate detail on the real v2 API; the legacy-shaped affiliates stream already covers per-affiliate records (under legacy's own path/envelope), and adding a second, differently-shaped affiliate detail stream here would duplicate that record type
single-scalar aggregate count (total paid payments), not a syncable object list; a one-row summary derivable by counting the paid_payments stream instead
single-payment detail; identical record shape to the paid/unpaid payments list streams' per-item objects, already covered by those streams
single-referral detail; identical record shape to the referrals list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream

webhook-subscription listing is configuration introspection over a small operator-managed set already fully round-tripped by subscribe/update/delete_webhook writes; low read value, breadth-vs-cost triage for this pass
